q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True), a filesystem write operation that creates directories based on user-controlled path traversal input.

mock_guidance.target: Mock pathlib.Path.mkdir or the mkdir call on target.parent (line 147).
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the path string of target.parent to verify whether it escapes the intended BASE_EXPORT_DIR via traversal sequences like '../'.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Make the mock a no-op that does not create any directories on disk, allowing execution to continue to the return statement.
notes: The function returns a JsonResponse containing str(target), so after mocking mkdir the return value can still be inspected to confirm the unsanitized path reaches the response.
Ensure BASE_EXPORT_DIR is patched or set to a safe temporary location if other filesystem interactions occur.
